description: Engineer II logged 4 hours at off-hours weekend rate; contract has no off-hours rate.

description: Hotel charge 290 USD/night at coastal point B (cap 195).

description: Alcohol charge 38 USD on hotel folio dinner receipt.
resolution: Reject. Not reimbursable per contract regardless of receipt total.

description: Drafting supplies 67 USD - no receipt in SharePoint.

description: Single scan contained 3 receipts totalling 245 USD; Analyst couldn't tell which was which.
resolution: Returned to traveller for itemized resubmission.

description: Subcontractor invoice received without markup applied.
resolution: Apply 8% per MSA section 3. Standing rule for this contract.

description: 3 transactions on hold for >2 cycles awaiting PL decision.
resolution: Released after PL email confirmation; transactions billed on cycle 2026-01.

description: Internal team meeting time logged against client project task code.

description: Receipt in CAD on a USD-billed project.
resolution: Convert at receipt-date FX. PL confirmed standard practice.

description: Different project - principal time logged above 5% cap; cap is project-specific.
resolution: Bill all hours - no cap on this project. Different from PRJ-NS-7421.
